❓ Frequently Asked Questions

How is EMI calculated?
EMI = P × r × (1+r)^n / ((1+r)^n - 1), where P=principal, r=monthly interest rate, n=total months.
What are current home loan interest rates in India?
Home loan rates range from 8.35% to 10.50% p.a. depending on bank and CIBIL score.
Can prepayment reduce my EMI?
Yes! Partial prepayment reduces outstanding principal, lowering EMI or tenure.
Is LucoVista really free?
100% free! No sign-up, no hidden fees. Supported by ads and donors. ❤️
